dev.title: Local development
dev.description: Fast iteration: IR cache on, embedding stub, no bridge/gateway caps. Override paths per machine.
notes: Set AINL_FS_ROOT / AINL_MEMORY_DB to a throwaway path when testing destructive flows.
Do not point production OpenClaw cron at this profile without reviewing caps.

staging.title: Staging / integration
staging.description: Closer to production: same defaults as dev plus conservative intelligence merge policy.
notes: Set PROMOTER_LLM_* on the gateway process before load tests.
Use ainl bridge-sizing-probe before enabling AINL_BRIDGE_REPORT_MAX_CHARS.

openclaw-default.title: OpenClaw host (recommended baseline)
openclaw-default.description: Portable defaults for bridge wrappers + intelligence: IR cache, stub embeddings until you opt into real vectors.
notes: Align OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE / OPENCLAW_MEMORY_DIR with the same values as run_wrapper_ainl and cron.
Enable AINL_WEEKLY_TOKEN_BUDGET_CAP when using rolling_budget_publish (see TOKEN_AND_USAGE_OBSERVABILITY.md).
After weekly-token-trends runs live, intelligence hydration can read weekly_remaining_v1.

cost-tight.title: Cost-tight (aggressive caps hints)
cost-tight.description: Lower ceiling on bridge report size; keeps stub embeddings and conservative daily merge. Tune numbers after measuring.
notes: AINL_BRIDGE_REPORT_MAX_CHARS may truncate token_budget_report; raise if operators need full text.
Add PROMOTER_LLM_MAX_PROMPT_CHARS / MAX_COMPLETION_TOKENS on the gateway in staging before production.
